field.name: ma_bp
field.check: ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from hrbp)

field.name: ma_vtr
field.check: ma_vtr not in (select ma_vtr from hrvt)

field.name: ma_mh
field.check: ma_mh not in (select ma_mh from hrdmmh)

processing.text:
declare @q nvarchar(4000), @key nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @user int, @admin bit, @r int
select @admin = @@admin, @user = @@userID, @key = ''
-- Check &Checking;
-- Key if @@admin = 0 begin if @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'hrTMRequirementJobPosition', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end select @key = ' where a.ma_bp in (select c.ma_bp from hrbp c, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp d where dbo.ff_Inlist(c.bp_ref, d.r_access2) = 1 and d.user_id = @@userID)' end
-- Gather select top 0 ma_bp, ma_vtr, ma_mh, ngay_hl, ngay_hh, ghi_chu into #r from hrdtyctvt select @q = 'insert into #r select a.ma_bp, a.ma_vtr, a.ma_mh, a.ngay_hl, a.ngay_hh, ghi_chu' select @q = @q + ' from @@table a' + @key exec sp_executesql @q
-- Delete if @type = '0' delete #r from #r a where exists(select 1 from hrdtyctvt b where a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and a.ma_vtr = b.ma_vtr and a.ma_mh = b.ma_mh) select a.ma_bp, a.ma_vtr, a.ma_mh, a.ngay_hl, a.ngay_hh, a.ghi_chu into #k from #r a join hrdtyctvt b on a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and a.ma_vtr = b.ma_vtr and a.ma_mh = b.ma_mh delete #r from #r a where exists(select 1 from #k b where a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and a.ma_vtr = b.ma_vtr and a.ma_mh = b.ma_mh)
-- Insert &Inserting; -- Update if @type = '1' begin &Updating; end
